generated_oml:
instance BcsSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System sensor for monitoring infrastructure parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BcsDataTransmitted
]

instance BcsDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BcsSensor
]

instance BcsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data from Building Control System components"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BcsDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware, DittoMiddleware
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono middleware for IoT data ingestion and device management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService
]

instance DittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto middleware for digital twin management and state synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for transforming BIM models into structured digital twin artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OperationalOptimizationService
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric models enriched with semantic data for Building Control System (BCS) components (sensors, actuators, controllers)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building infrastructure via continuous data integration"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, VisualizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure health and performance forecasting"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveHealthInsight, PerformanceForecastingInsight
]

instance OperationalOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of operational processes for reduced costs and enhanced efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalOptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time status of building systems for Facility Managers"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization of system states for operational monitoring and control"
]

instance PredictiveHealthInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights on infrastructure health and potential failures"
]

instance PerformanceForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasting of performance metrics for proactive management"
]

instance OperationalOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights for optimizing operational processes and reducing costs"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building infrastructure environment"
    base:contains FacilityManager, BuildingControlEngineer, DTEngineer
]

instance FacilityManager : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for real-time monitoring and control of building systems"
]

instance BuildingControlEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for device modeling and deployment"
]

instance DTEngineer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role responsible for integrating custom services and analytics"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT Framework enables bidirectional communication to transmit control commands from Facility Managers through the digital twin interface to Building Control Systems for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts, enabling immediate monitoring and control operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration and runtime configuration management, where the DT Framework orchestrates bidirectional data exchange across roles to enable holistic building lifecycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) based extraction of structured representations and automatic generation of deployable artifacts. Operational phases include real-time data synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and evolution through modular extension points enabling integration of custom services by DT Engineers to address changing requirements."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT Framework utilizes Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware for technical connectivity, extracting tenant and device identifiers or endpoint addresses as metadata to support dynamic registration of physical assets."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Nonfunctional requirements (NF_X) address critical aspects of interoperability across heterogeneous systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards and AECO-specific system requirements, utilizing standardized extension points to ensure interoperability with existing protocols and heterogeneous environments, thereby enabling consistent data exchange and compliance with industry specifications."
]
